mapper.select:
SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.order_dt,
o.order_status_cd, os.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS order_status_name,
o.delivery_type_cd, dt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS delivery_type_name,
o.delivery_status_cd, ds.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS delivery_status_name,
o.goods_total_amt, o.delivery_total_amt, o.discount_total_amt, o.vat_total_amt, o.pay_total_amt,
o.buyer_member_id, bm.COMPANY_NAME AS buyer_company_name,
o.region_sido_cd, o.region_sigungu_cd, o.receiver_name, o.receiver_mobile, o.op_type,
/* 대표 상품명 (첫 라인) */ ( SELECT oi.sales_prod_name FROM tb_order_item oi WHERE oi.order_id = o.order_id AND oi.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY oi.line_no ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS first_sales_prod_name,
/* 라인수 */ ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_order_item oi WHERE oi.order_id = o.order_id AND oi.del_yn = 'N' ) AS item_count,
/* 총수량 */ ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(oi.order_qty), 0) FROM tb_order_item oi WHERE oi.order_id = o.order_id AND oi.del_yn = 'N' ) AS total_order_qty
FROM tb_order o LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER bm ON bm.MEMBER_ID = o.buyer_member_id
LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE os ON os.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'ORDER_STATUS' AND os.CODE_ID = 'ORDER_STATUS' AND os.DETAIL_CODE_ID = o.order_status_cd AND os.USE_YN = 'Y' AND os.DEL_YN = 'N'
LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE dt ON dt.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'DELIVERY_TYPE' AND dt.CODE_ID = 'DELIVERY_TYPE' AND dt.DETAIL_CODE_ID = o.delivery_type_cd AND dt.USE_YN = 'Y' AND dt.DEL_YN = 'N'
LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE ds ON ds.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'DELIVERY_STATUS' AND ds.CODE_ID = 'DELIVERY_STATUS' AND ds.DETAIL_CODE_ID = o.delivery_status_cd AND ds.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ds.DEL_YN = 'N'
ORDER BY o.order_id DESC
LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_order o LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER bm ON bm.MEMBER_ID = o.buyer_member_id

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.goods_total_amt), 0) AS sum_goods_total_amt, COALESCE(SUM(o.delivery_total_amt), 0) AS sum_delivery_total_amt, COALESCE(SUM(o.discount_total_amt), 0) AS sum_discount_total_amt, COALESCE(SUM(o.pay_total_amt), 0) AS sum_pay_total_amt FROM tb_order o LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER bm ON bm.MEMBER_ID = o.buyer_member_id

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.order_dt, o.order_status_cd, os.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS orderStatusName, o.delivery_type_cd, dt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS deliveryTypeName, o.delivery_status_cd, ds.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS deliveryStatusName, o.goods_total_amt, o.delivery_total_amt, o.discount_total_amt, o.vat_total_amt, o.pay_total_amt, o.buyer_member_id, bm.COMPANY_NAME AS buyerCompanyName, bm.CEO_NAME AS buyerName, /* Using CEO_NAME as buyerName standpoint */ bm.CEO_MOBILE_NO AS buyerMobile, bm.EMAIL AS buyerEmail, o.region_sido_cd, o.region_sigungu_cd, o.receiver_name, o.receiver_mobile, o.zip_code AS receiverZipCode, o.addr1 AS receiverAddr1, o.addr2 AS receiverAddr2, o.op_type FROM tb_order o LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER bm ON bm.MEMBER_ID = o.buyer_member_id LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE os ON os.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'ORDER_STATUS' AND os.CODE_ID = 'ORDER_STATUS' AND os.DETAIL_CODE_ID = o.order_status_cd AND os.USE_YN = 'Y' AND os.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE dt ON dt.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'DELIVERY_TYPE' AND dt.CODE_ID = 'DELIVERY_TYPE' AND dt.DETAIL_CODE_ID = o.delivery_type_cd AND dt.USE_YN = 'Y' AND dt.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE ds ON ds.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'DELIVERY_STATUS' AND ds.CODE_ID = 'DELIVERY_STATUS' AND ds.DETAIL_CODE_ID = o.delivery_status_cd AND ds.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ds.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.sales_prod_id, oi.sales_prod_name, oi.sale_unit_price AS salesPrice, oi.order_qty, (oi.sale_unit_price * oi.order_qty) AS supplyAmt, oi.vat_amt, oi.pay_amt AS totalAmt FROM tb_order_item oi JOIN tb_order o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} AND oi.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY oi.line_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_order_delivery_parcel ( order_id, courier_cd, tracking_no, delivery_region_cd, shipped_dt, use_yn, del_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, op_type ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{courierCd}, #{trackingNo}, #{deliveryRegionCd}, #{shippedDt}, 'Y', 'N', #{regId}, NOW(), #{opType} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE courier_cd = #{courierCd}, tracking_no = #{trackingNo}, delivery_region_cd = #{deliveryRegionCd}, shipped_dt = #{shippedDt}, op_type = #{opType}, mod_id = #{modId}, mod_dt = NOW()

INSERT INTO tb_order_delivery_freight ( order_id, shipping_method_cd, freight_company_name, driver_name, driver_mobile, truck_no, delivery_region_cd, shipped_dt, use_yn, del_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, op_type ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{shippingMethodCd}, #{freightCompanyName}, #{driverName}, #{driverMobile}, #{truckNo}, #{deliveryRegionCd}, #{shippedDt}, 'Y', 'N', #{regId}, NOW(), #{opType} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE shipping_method_cd = #{shippingMethodCd}, freight_company_name = #{freightCompanyName}, driver_name = #{driverName}, driver_mobile = #{driverMobile}, truck_no = #{truckNo}, delivery_region_cd = #{deliveryRegionCd}, shipped_dt = #{shippedDt}, op_type = #{opType}, mod_id = #{modId}, mod_dt = NOW()

INSERT INTO tb_order_delivery_factory ( order_id, pickup_place_cd, pickup_dt, contact_name, contact_mobile, use_yn, del_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, op_type ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{pickupPlaceCd}, #{pickupDt}, #{contactName}, #{contactMobile}, 'Y', 'N', #{regId}, NOW(), #{opType} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pickup_place_cd = #{pickupPlaceCd}, pickup_dt = #{pickupDt}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_mobile = #{contactMobile}, op_type = #{opType}, mod_id = #{modId}, mod_dt = NOW()
